Based on my examination of atom O:11 from multiple angles, I can now report the findings:

## Neighbour Atoms of O:11

The atom with atomic index 11 is **Oxygen (O)**. 

Its covalently connected neighbour atoms are:

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 10 | C (Carbon) |
| 12 | C (Carbon) |

O:11 is an ether oxygen that forms single bonds to two carbon atoms (C:10 and C:12). I examined the molecule from multiple angles to confirm there are only these two covalently bonded neighbors.

## Geomconf Index

**geomconf_index: 9944**

(This is derived from the filename `geomconf_9944.xyz`)

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 11, whose element should be O. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
